name: Discount Calculator
desc: Calculate the final price and savings with a percentage discount.
seo_description: Use our free discount calculator to quickly estimate precio_final, savings based on precio_original, descuento_pct. Not registration needed.
example_label: Calculate final price after 20% discount on 80 EUR.
result_context: The precio_final of {precio_final} is what you pay after discount. the savings of {savings} shows how much you saved.
mistakes: Adding discount percentag is when multiple discounts apply (should compound)
Calculating discount from wrong base price
Forgetting to check if discount appli is to sale items
